reviews.comment:
Los precios como en todos lados, la estación es chiquita, pero la fila avanza bastante rápido. Es una de las pocas estaciones del barrio donde no cobran para usar el coso para controlar el aire de las ruedas

(Translated by Google)
The prices are like everywhere else. The station is small, but the line moves pretty quickly. It's one of the few stations in the neighborhood where there's no charge to use the tire inflation area.

reviews.comment:
Como socios siempre cargamos acá y la atención es excelente!!!! no hay de que quejarse y el que lo hace será porque esta de paso y esta acostumbrado a las que no tienen muchos clientes

(Translated by Google)
As members, we always load up here, and the service is excellent! There's nothing to complain about, and those who do will be passing through and are used to places that don't have many customers.
